resources.title: OpenClaw 설치 및 온보딩
resources.description: Node.js 20+ 환경에서 OpenClaw를 설치하고 온보딩 마법사로 Claude API + 텔레그램 봇을 연결합니다.

resources.title: 첫 번째 ClawHub 스킬 설치
resources.description: ClawHub에서 daily-briefing 스킬을 설치하고 매일 아침 자동 브리핑을 받도록 설정합니다.
resources.command: openclaw skills install daily-briefing && openclaw skills install web-search && openclaw skills list

resources.title: 커스텀 스킬 작성 및 배포
resources.description: GitHub Issues 알림 스킬을 직접 마크다운으로 작성하고 로컬 테스트 후 ClawHub에 배포합니다.
resources.command: openclaw skills validate my-skill.md && openclaw hub publish my-skill.md --category productivity

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of the OpenClaw platform?
options: To create a personal AI assistant using Claude and Telegram
To develop video games using AI
To manage social media accounts automatically
quiz.explanation: OpenClaw is designed to integrate Claude with Telegram to build a personal AI assistant.

quiz.question: Which programming environment is required to install OpenClaw?
quiz.explanation: OpenClaw requires Node.js 20+ for installation and operation.

quiz.question: What feature does ClawHub provide for users?
options: A platform for searching, installing, and deploying community skills
A marketplace for buying AI agents
An online course for learning programming languages
A forum for discussing AI ethics
quiz.explanation: ClawHub is a platform that allows users to search, install, and deploy community skills.
